series_metadata.series_description: File contains the time the inspector arrived at the underground storage tank site, the time spent there, and the time of departure. Also contains the incident number, site name and location, and any other information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable format on approved database permanently. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable format has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
